problem id: 3a67aa26
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) AND NOT SHR(2)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  01101110 -> 01011011
  11011110 -> 00110111
  11001000 -> 10111011
  10011001 -> 01110111
  10100000 -> 10101111
  01111011 -> 10011110
  01001110 -> 01011011
  00001111 -> 10111011
  11101011 -> 11111010
  11110010 -> 00111110

query: 10111010
predicted answer: 00101110
